emails.subject: Wheeling Agreement
emails.body: Wheeling Agreement Dear Mary, I spoke to you last week with regards to a sample wheeling agreement our team needed. Please let me know if you need me to supply any information. I look forward to hearing from you. Regards, Nancy

emails.subject: RE: Wheeling Agreement
emails.body: RE: Wheeling Agreement Mary, No I did not receive it but I am not surprised since I did not receive other emails. The solutions team had been in the process of reinstalling my applications to a another laptop and somehow my emails were affected. Please forward it to me again. Thank you so much, Nancy
